allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,deps[k]\) for k in sorted\(deps\) if 'image' in k or 'file' in k or 'camera' in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,'->',list\(v.keys\(\)\)\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lock=json.load\(sys.stdin\); entries = {k:v['version'] for k,v in lock['packages'].items\(\) if '@types/react' in k and 'react-native' not in k}; print\(entries\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: p.get\(k\) for k in ['peerDependencies','dependencies','devDependencies']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: p.get\(k\) for k in ['scripts', 'devDependencies']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('jest', d.get\('scripts',{}\)\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Version:', d['version']\); print\('Jest dep:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('jest','none'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Version:', d['version']\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'jest' in k.lower\(\) or 'babel' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Version:', d['version']\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'jest' in k.lower\(\) or 'babel' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('devDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('scripts test:', d.get\('scripts',{}\).get\('test',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p['version']\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(p.get\('peerDependencies', {}\), indent=2\)\)")
